items.title: Cusack's Sheff Utd coach called her a 'psycho', inquest hears
items.summary: Former Sheffield United midfielder Maddy Cusack's coach had called her a "psycho" and was playing mind games with her before her death, an inquest has heard.

items.title: Fuchs blows kiss to bowler after smashing six into river on cricket debut
items.summary: Just a day after resigning as Newport County head coach, Christian Fuchs blows a kiss to a bowler after hitting him for six while making his cricket debut for Derbyshire village side Grindleford.

items.title: England World Cup clash is biggest event in DR Congo’s history – eclipsing even Rumble in the Jungle – says ex-EFL star
